name: Marinated Cucumber Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Assemble the rotor slicer/shredder with the thin slicer cone (no 4).
2. Turn the slicer to speed 4 and slice cucumbers and onions.
3. Add the sliced vegetables to a large bowl.
4. Mix in vinegar, water, sugar, dill, salt, and pepper.
5. Cover the mixture and refrigerate for at least 3 hours before serving.
6-8 servings
